# Private-content denylist — PUBLIC-TAP SUBSET.
# Per AQS-7 / private-content-firewall decision (2026-05-05).
#
# This repo (arqtiqa/homebrew-arqtos) is PUBLIC. The canonical denylist in the
# private source (arqtiqa/arqtos:scripts/private-content-denylist.txt) also
# matches the operator's real name, personal email, affiliated org domains, and
# machine-hostname scheme. Those literal patterns are DELIBERATELY OMITTED here:
# committing them to a public repo would itself leak the very identifiers they
# guard. This public copy keeps only the generic secret / private-network
# shapes, which are non-identifying and safe to expose.
#
# The omitted identifier patterns stay enforced on the private arqtiqa/* repos
# by the canonical denylist. The high-value leak vector for a formula + README
# tap is an accidentally-committed token — caught by the patterns below.
#
# Format: one POSIX extended regex per line. Lines starting with `#` and blank
# lines are ignored. No inline comments — put commentary on its own line.
#
# Read by `scripts/check-private-content.sh` (CI / pre-commit hook gate).

# ---- Private network ranges ----
# Literal IPs from RFC1918 home/lan ranges. Anchored octets avoid matching
# version numbers like "10.0.1" in random text.
\b(192\.168\.|10\.0\.|10\.1\.|172\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1])\.)[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\b

# ---- Tokens / secrets ----
# Never committed regardless of which repo. Pattern shapes from the issuing
# service's documented format.

# GitHub personal access tokens (classic + fine-grained).
ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36,}
gho_[A-Za-z0-9]{36,}
github_pat_[A-Za-z0-9_]{82,}

# Linear API tokens.
lin_api_[A-Za-z0-9]{40,}

# 1Password literal vault/item references that pin a real path.
op://[A-Za-z0-9_-]+/[A-Za-z0-9_-]+
